_publications._publicationTitle: Kinome Profiling of NF1-Related MPNSTs in Response to Kinase Inhibition and Doxorubicin Reveals Therapeutic Vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: After 21 days of capmatinib treatment, resistant populations reprogrammed the kinome via AXL and EGFR. Besides activation of the AKT/mTOR pathway, ERK reactivation was consistently present
details: After 21 days of treatment, resistant populations reprogrammed kinome via AXL and EGFR with ERK reactivation consistently present
